hero.title: Kingdom of Heaven
hero.reason: In honor of King Kamehameha Day, a holiday that celebrates the unity and leadership of King Kamehameha I of Hawaii, this film is chosen for its epic portrayal of a heroic leader during the Crusades.
hero.blurb: This historical epic boasts stunning visuals, intense action sequences, and a gripping narrative. With its themes of leadership and honor, it's a fitting tribute to the legendary King Kamehameha.

released.title: Oceans Thirteen
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this heist film still shines with its witty dialogue, clever plot twists, and an all-star ensemble cast.
released.blurb: The third installment in the Ocean's franchise brings back the magic with its charming characters, sleek style, and non-stop entertainment. It's a fun ride that never gets old.

birthday.title: Urban Cowboy
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Adrienne Barbeau, born June 11, 1945, this film showcases her talents as a strong and independent woman in a classic romantic drama.
birthday.blurb: This iconic film explores the lives of two people from different worlds, falling in love in a small Texas town. With its memorable soundtrack and authentic characters, it's a timeless classic.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot, poor acting, and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a guilty pleasure for fans of so-bad-it's-good cinema.
awful.blurb: With a messy narrative and over-the-top performances, this film is a trainwreck that's impossible to look away from. It's a mesmerizing disaster that will leave you questioning the sanity of its creators.
